72 class SubFlags
73 {
74 private:
75  uint8_t value_;
76 
77 public:
78  inline SubFlags(uint8_t value) { value_ = value; }
79 
80  inline operator uint8_t() const { return value_; }
81 
82  inline SubFlags operator|(const SubFlags& other) const
83  {
84  return SubFlags(value_ | other.value_);
85  }
86 
87  inline SubFlags& operator|=(const SubFlags& other)
88  {
89  value_ |= other.value_;
90  return *this;
91  }
92 
93  inline SubFlags operator&(const SubFlags& other) const
94  {
95  return SubFlags(value_ & other.value_);
96  }
97 
98  inline SubFlags& operator&=(const SubFlags& other)
99  {
100  value_ &= other.value_;
101  return *this;
102  }
103 
104  inline bool operator==(const SubFlags& other) const
105  {
106  return value_ == other.value_;
107  }
108 
109  inline bool contains(const SubFlags& other) const
110  {
111  return (value_ & other.value_) > 0;
112  }
113 
114  static SubFlags QUOTE();
115  static SubFlags DEPTH();
116  static SubFlags BROKER();
117  static SubFlags TRADE();
118 };
119

1557 {

1605  std::string currency;

1609  std::optional<int32_t> limit_depth_level;
1611  std::optional<int32_t> trigger_count;
1613  std::optional<Decimal> monitor_price;
1615  std::string remark;
1616 };

3422 enum class DCAFrequency
3423 {
3424  Daily = 0,
3425  Weekly = 1,
3426  Fortnightly = 2,
3427  Monthly = 3,
3428 };
3429 
3431 enum class DCAStatus
3432 {
3433  Active = 0,
3434  Suspended = 1,
3435  Finished = 2,
3436 };
3437 
3439 struct DcaPlan
3440 {
3442  std::string plan_id;
3444  DCAStatus status;
3446  std::string symbol;
3448  std::string member_id;
3450  std::string aaid;
3452  std::string account_channel;
3454  std::string display_account;
3456  longbridge::Market market;
3458  std::string per_invest_amount;
3460  DCAFrequency invest_frequency;
3462  std::string invest_day_of_week;
3464  std::string invest_day_of_month;
3466  bool allow_margin_finance;
3468  std::string alter_hours;
3470  std::string created_at;
3472  std::string updated_at;
3474  std::string next_trd_date;
3476  std::string stock_name;
3478  std::string cum_amount;
3480  int64_t issue_number;
3482  std::string average_cost;
3484  std::string cum_profit;
3485 };
3486

3492 };

3510  std::string total_profit;
3511 };
